Title: Life of Pi

Title: Fantastic Mr. Fox

Title: Iron Man

Title: Shaun of the Dead

Title: Mystic River

Title: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban

Title: Cowboy Bebop: Tengoku no tobira
Description: A terrorist explosion releases a deadly virus on the masses, and it's up the bounty-hunting Bebop crew to catch the cold-blooded culprit.

Title: Almost Famous

Title: Shrek

Title: Charade

Thanks to his fractured state of mind and her vivid imagination, the line between fiction and reality blurs as the tale advances.

Title: Little Miss Sunshine

Title: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button

Title: Waking Life

Title: Ed Wood

Description: As the German Fascists expand their borders, scorching Europe from end to end, two brave Czechs of the Resistance prepare for a suicide mission to assassinate Reinhard Heydrich, the hideous mastermind behind the "Final Solution".

Title: Just Before I Go

Title: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice
Description: Fearing that the actions of Superman are left unchecked, Batman takes on the Man of Steel, while the world wrestles with what kind of a hero it really needs.

Title: The Purge: Anarchy
Description: Three groups of people intertwine and are left stranded in the streets on Purge Night, trying to survive the chaos and violence that occurs.

Title: Lucy
Description: A woman, accidentally caught in a dark deal, turns the tables on her captors and transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

Title: Pitch Perfect 2
Description: After a humiliating command performance at The Kennedy Center, the Barden Bellas enter an international competition that no American group has ever won in order to regain their status and right to perform.

Title: Top Five
Description: A comedian tries to make it as a serious actor when his reality television star fiancée talks him into broadcasting their wedding on her television show.

Title: The Grinch
Description: A grumpy Grinch plots to ruin Christmas for the village of Whoville.

Title: Project Almanac
Description: A group of teens discover secret plans of a time machine, and construct one. However, things start to get out of control.

Title: Creep
Description: A young videographer answers an online ad for a one-day job in a remote town to record the last messages of a dying man. When he notices the man's odd behavior, he starts to question his intentions.

Title: Ain't Them Bodies Saints

Title: Need for Speed

Title: Live by Night

Title: Mississippi Grind

Description: The crew of a colony ship, bound for a remote planet, discover an uncharted paradise with a threat beyond their imagination, and must attempt a harrowing escape.

Title: Black Sea

Title: White Bird in a Blizzard
Description: In 1988, a teenage girl's life is thrown into chaos when her mother disappears.

Title: The Mountain Between Us
Description: Stranded after a tragic plane crash, two strangers must forge a connection to survive the extreme elements of a remote snow-covered mountain. When they realize help is not coming, they embark on a perilous journey across the wilderness.

Title: Prince Avalanche

Title: Two Night Stand
Description: A snowstorm forces two people who made an online connection to unwillingly extend their one-night stand as the blizzard goes through the night.

Title: Hidden
Description: A family takes refuge in a bomb shelter to avoid a dangerous outbreak.

Title: Hours

Title: Mr. Right

Title: A Bigger Splash
Description: The vacation of a famous rock star and her boyfriend in Italy is disrupted by the unexpected visit of an old friend and his daughter.

Title: Europa Report
Description: An international crew of astronauts undertakes a privately funded mission to search for life on Jupiter's fourth largest moon.

Title: The Frozen Ground

Title: It's a Disaster

Title: Pain & Gain

Title: Compliance

Description: Bound by a shared destiny, a teen bursting with scientific curiosity and a former boy-genius inventor embark on a mission to unearth the secrets of a place somewhere in time and space that exists in their collective memory.

Title: Grudge Match

Title: The Woman in Black

Title: The Voices
Description: A likable guy pursues his office crush with help from his evil talking pets, but things turn sinister when she stands him up for a date.

Description: After a journalist discovers his identity, a former Weather Underground activist goes on the run.

Title: Army of Thieves

Title: Solace
Description: Psychic John Clancy (Sir Anthony Hopkins) works with the F.B.I. in order to hunt down a serial killer.

Description: A seemingly perfect family moves into a suburban neighborhood, but when it comes to the truth as to why they're living there, they don't exactly come clean with their neighbors.

Title: From Paris with Love

Description: A small-town girl ventures to Los Angeles and finds her place in a neo-burlesque club run by a former dancer.

Title: The Invention of Lying

Title: Henry Poole Is Here
Description: Henry Poole moves in to a house in his old neighborhood, to spend what he believes are his remaining days alone. The discovery of a "miracle" by a nosy neighbor ruptures his solitude and restores his faith in life.

Title: Choke
Description: A sex-addicted con-man pays for his mother's hospital bills by playing on the sympathies of those who rescue him from choking to death.

Title: Centurion
Description: A splinter group of Roman soldiers fight for their lives behind enemy lines after their legion is devastated in a guerrilla attack.

Title: Alice in Wonderland
Description: Nineteen-year-old Alice returns to the magical world from her childhood adventure, where she reunites with her old friends and learns of her true destiny: to end the Red Queen's reign of terror.

Description: This Baltimore-set movie of interconnecting story arcs deals with the challenges of reading or misreading human behavior.

Title: The Experiment
Description: 26 men are chosen to participate in the roles of guards and prisoners in a psychological study that ultimately spirals out of control.

Title: 17 Again
Description: Mike O'Donnell is ungrateful for how his life turned out. He gets a chance to rewrite his life when he tried to save a janitor near a bridge and jumped after him into a time vortex.

Title: Salt
Description: A CIA agent goes on the run after a defector accuses her of being a Russian spy.

Title: Monsters vs. Aliens
Description: A woman transformed into a giant after she is struck by a meteorite on her wedding day becomes part of a team of monsters sent in by the U.S. government to defeat an alien mastermind trying to take over Earth.

Title: Snitch

Title: The Collector
Description: Desperate to repay his debt to his ex-wife, an ex-con plots a heist at his new employer's country home, unaware that a second criminal has also targeted the property, and rigged it with a series of deadly traps.

Description: The world is beset by the appearance of monstrous creatures, but one of them may be the only one who can save humanity.

Title: She's Out of My League
Description: An average Joe meets the perfect woman, but his lack of confidence and the influence of his friends and family begin to pick away at the relationship.

Title: Be Kind Rewind

Title: Mamma Mia!
Description: The story of a bride-to-be trying to find her real father told using hit songs by the popular 1970s group ABBA.

Title: Stop-Loss
Description: A veteran soldier returns from his completed tour of duty in Iraq, only to find his life turned upside down when he is arbitrarily ordered to return to field duty by the Army.

Description: A young man, much to the chagrin of his father, becomes the new assistant to an illusionist in decline.

Title: The Hills Have Eyes

Title: Hoodwinked!
Description: Little Red Riding Hood, the Wolf, the Woodsman, and Granny all tell the police the events that led up to their encounter.

Enrolled in an elite gymnastics program run by the legendary Burt Vickerman (Jeff Bridges), Haley's rebellious attitude gives way to something that just might be called team spirit.

Title: Youth in Revolt

Title: Nochnoy dozor

Title: The Big White
Description: To remedy his financial problems, a travel agent has his eye on a frozen corpse, which just happens to be sought after by two hitmen.

Title: The Longest Yard

Title: In Good Company

Title: Accepted
Description: A high school slacker who's rejected by every school he applies to opts to create his own institution of higher learning, the South Harmon Institute of Technology, on a rundown piece of property near his hometown.

Title: The Interpreter

Title: Spanglish

Title: Elizabethtown
Description: During a hometown memorial for his Kentucky-born father, a young man begins an unexpected romance with a too-good-to-be-true stewardess.

Title: Shortbus
Description: A group of New Yorkers caught up in their romantic-sexual milieu converge at an underground salon infamous for its blend of art, music, politics, and carnality.

Title: Criminal

Title: Robots

Title: The Day After Tomorrow

Title: Laurel Canyon
Description: When an uptight young man and his fiancée move into his libertine mother's house, the resulting clash of life attitudes shakes everyone up.

Title: Mindhunters

Title: Once Upon a Time in Mexico

Title: National Lampoon's Van Wilder

Title: The Good Girl

Description: Things go wrong for a high ranking mobster when he doesn't proceed by his boss's orders.

Title: Ida

Several women enter a science fiction author's life over the course of a few years, after the author has lost the woman he considers his one true love.

Title: Caché

Description: One murdered man, eight women, each seeming to be eager than the others to know the truth. Gimme, gimme, gimme some clues to make up my mind. And eventually enter the truth. Oh, thou cruel woman!

Title: Jeux d'enfants

While they often act out to relieve one another's pain, their game might be a way to avoid the fact that they are truly meant for one another.

Title: Qu'est-ce qu'on a fait au Bon Dieu?

Title: Angel-A

Title: L'immortel
Description: A retired mobster goes on a revenge spree after being left for dead with 22 bullets in his body by his former childhood friend.

Title: Hors de prix
Description: Through a set of wacky circumstances, a young gold digger mistakenly woos a mild-mannered bartender, thinking he's a wealthy suitor.

Title: L'auberge espagnole

Description: Teacher and novelist François Bégaudeau plays a version of himself as he negotiates a year with his racially mixed students from a tough Parisian neighborhood.

Title: Wasabi

Title: L'ennemi public n°1
Description: The story of the notorious French gangster Jacques Mesrine, with the focus on his life and death as France's Public Enemy No. 1 in the 1970s.

Title: Micmacs à tire-larigot
